name: UDS Overview
title: Unified Diagnostic Services (UDS) Overview
intro: UDS (Unified Diagnostic Services, ISO 14229) is the standard diagnostic communication protocol used in modern road vehicles.
It is an application-layer protocol that runs over various transport layers: CAN (ISO 15765 / DoCAN), Ethernet (DoIP), K-Line (KWP2000 over K-line), and FlexRay.

paragraphs: UDS uses 1-byte Service Identifiers (SID). Request SID is base, response SID is base+0x40.
A standard UDS session follows: open session -> security access -> read/write/test -> close session.
